title: Demand Manager / Portfolio Manager (m/w/d) ServiceNow
required_skills: Degree in Business Informatics, Business Administration with IT focus, or comparable field with several years experience
Experience in requirements or demand management, ideally with strong ServiceNow platform knowledge
Prior experience as Business Analyst, Inhouse Consultant, or similar interface role between business and IT
Broad ServiceNow platform knowledge — not just ITSM but ideally CSM, HRSD, FSM or App Engine
Strong analytical and conceptual skills to translate complex business processes into solution concepts
Excellent communication and presentation skills for business unit advisory and workshop facilitation
Strategic mindset and ability to see beyond immediate scope
Very good German and good English
bonus_skills: Experience working with external software manufacturers
matched_skills: Stakeholder advisory and cross-functional coordination (HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd)
Workshop facilitation and communication skills (HSBC town halls, Hapag-Lloyd meetings)
Strategic thinking and demand prioritisation (HSBC — 6 workstream management)
missing_skills: No ServiceNow platform knowledge of any kind
No ITSM, CSM, HRSD, FSM, or App Engine ServiceNow modules experience
Very good German required — candidate has B1
core_responsibilities: Act as central point of contact for ServiceNow capabilities, advising business departments on process improvements via ServiceNow
Analyse and evaluate new demands, assess how ServiceNow modules can optimally address them
Liaise with ServiceNow vendor and experts on technical/process feasibility of complex requirements
Build deep understanding of entire ServiceNow portfolio to guide strategic platform development
Prepare qualified requirements and convert to decision templates for demand/portfolio process
Ensure platform-native standards are used and avoid silo solutions
recommended_emphasis: Do not apply — ServiceNow expertise is the core technical competency and the candidate has none
German B1 is insufficient for a role requiring 'sehr gut Deutsch' in complex business advisory context
The stakeholder coordination and demand prioritisation skills are genuinely relevant in general project management but don't substitute for platform expertise here
summary: Match score is 10.5 (poor_match). This role is fundamentally centred on ServiceNow platform expertise across multiple modules (ITSM, CSM, HRSD, FSM, App Engine) — a technical domain the candidate has zero exposure to. Additionally, the role requires near-native German for complex business advisory and workshop facilitation. Despite genuine strengths in stakeholder management and cross-functional coordination, the technical and language gaps make this a clear non-match. Do not apply.
